chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-143 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 2. For orders on Misc. No.609/2026. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2026. Petitioner is present in person. ------ 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 1&3. The Petitioner is present in person and submits that he has instituted proceedings before the Respondent No.1 Authority vide Application No.31/2018, which has not yet been decided, albeit the matter having been reserved for judgment in September 2025. He further submits that he would be satisfied if directions were issued for the matter to be decided without further delay. So ordered. The Respondent No.1 ought to decide the matter, if pending, in accordance with law through a speaking Order without undue delay, preferably within a period of 30 days from today. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the Respondent No.1 for information and compliance. The Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
